# MuleSoft Amazon Bedrock Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.0) of Amazon Bedrock Connector documentation.
> See [Amazon Bedrock Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-bedrock-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Amazon Bedrock Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Amazon Bedrock Connector - Additional Configuration Information](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-bedrock-connector/latest/amazon-bedrock-connector-additional-config.md)
- [Using Anypoint Code Builder to Configure Amazon Bedrock Connector 1.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-bedrock-connector/latest/amazon-bedrock-connector-config-acb.md)
- [Amazon Bedrock Connector 1.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-bedrock-connector/latest/amazon-bedrock-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Amazon Bedrock Connector 1.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-bedrock-connector/latest/amazon-bedrock-connector-studio.md)
- [Amazon Bedrock Connector 1.0.0 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-bedrock-connector/latest/amazon-bedrock-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Configuring Agent Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-bedrock-connector/latest/configuring-agent-operations.md)
- [Configuring Chat Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-bedrock-connector/latest/configuring-chat-operations.md)
- [Configuring Embedding Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-bedrock-connector/latest/configuring-embedding-operations.md)
- [Configuring Foundational Model Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-bedrock-connector/latest/configuring-foundational-model-operations.md)
- [Configuring Image Generation Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-bedrock-connector/latest/configuring-image-generation-operations.md)
- [Configuring Sentiment Analysis Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-bedrock-connector/latest/configuring-sentiment-analysis-operations.md)
- [Amazon Bedrock Connector 1.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-bedrock-connector/latest/index.md)
